text:
First, note that time zones as we know them did not exist in 1571.  
But for the sake of the exercise, we assume modern time zone rules applied historically.

Europe/Paris is UTC+1 (standard time) and Australia/Sydney is UTC+10 (standard time).  
The time difference is 10 − 1 = 9 hours ahead for Sydney.

6:00 in Paris + 9 hours = 15:00 (3 PM) on the same date.

FINAL_ANSWER: 1571-11-12 15:00
